xmldoc.short_description: Return true if a property belongs to an object or class.

param_input_item.param_description: a class name as a string

param_output_item.param_description: a logical scalar, or a logical array with the same size as the object array

description.p: isprop returns logical 1 if the property is defined for the object or class and logical 0 otherwise.
For classdef object arrays, the result has the same size as the object array.
For classdef classes, isprop can report private and protected properties as existing. Use properties to list public properties.

example_item.example_item_description: Test properties on a classdef handle array.
